case_title: HUJAZI, MONICA vs. FONSECA, WILFREDO et al

DEPT 1/JUDGE MASON: PARTIES RETURNED TO DEPT 1 AFTER SETTLEMENT CONF. DEFT IS NOT PRESENT; IS OUT OF COUNTRY IN NICARAGUA. DEFT ATNY MS. DAVIS DOES NOT HAVE FULL SETTLEMENT AUTHORITY. SETTL CONF CONT'D TO 1-6-97 AT 2:00PM IN DEPT 1. NOTICE WAIVED. PLTF MAY BRING MOTION FOR COSTS/AND OR SANCTIONS.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT FONSECA, WILFREDO THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 3207 MISSION STREET #6, SAN FRANCISCO, CA $456.00 RENT, TOTAL JUDGMENT $456.00, STAYED UNTIL JAN-31-1997, LEASE FORFEITED, EACH SIDE TO BEAR OWN COSTS & FEES. DEFT WAIVES RIGHT TO RETURN OF ANY DEPOSITS OR RENTS INCLUDING INTEREST. NO FURTHER STAYS.
DECLARATION OF DAILY RENTAL VALUE $20.26 FILED BY PLAINTIFF HUJAZI, MONICA

DEPT 1/JUDGE MASON: DEFENDANT THROUGH COUNSEL WAIVES JURY IN DEPT 1. SETTLEMENT CONF IS VACATED; TRIAL SET FOR 1-8-97 WILL BE COURT TRIAL. AGREEMENT BETWEEN COUNSEL THAT PLTF WILL NOT ASK FOR SANCTIONS RE UNAVAILIBILITY OF DEFT AT FIRST SETTLEMENT CONF ON 1-2-97.
